auth.name: Izina
auth.loginFailed: Kwinjira byanze. Ongera urebe imyirondoro yawe.
auth.passwordLength: Ijambo ryibanga rigomba kugira nibura inyuguti 6.

dashboard.title: SmartPayRW igufasha gucunga abakozi, imishahara n'imisoro byoroshye.
dashboard.description: Reba amafaranga y'imishahara, imisoro, ubwishyu na pansiyo mu mwanya umwe.
dashboard.demoNotice: Amakuru nyayo y'imbonerahamwe ntaboneka. Huza seriveri kugira ngo ubone imibare y'ikigo cyawe.

analytics.totalPayrollCaption: Amafaranga yose y'imishahara muri iki gihe

pension.title: Pansiyo ya RSSB
pension.description: Reba amafaranga ajya muri pansiyo, uruhare rw'umukozi n'urw'umukoresha.

compliance.title: Amategeko n'amabwiriza
compliance.description: Ibi bigufasha kumenya ibyo ugomba kwishyura no igihe bigomba gutangirwa.
compliance.payeText: PAYE ni umusoro ukatwa ku mushahara w'umukozi ukoherezwa muri RRA.
compliance.rssbText: Pansiyo ya RSSB igizwe n'uruhare rw'umukozi {{employeeRate}} n'urw'umukoresha {{employerRate}}.
compliance.deadlineText: Ugomba kwishyura imisoro mbere ya tariki ya 15 buri kwezi.
compliance.note: Banza wemeze imibare mbere yo gutanga imenyekanisha.

readiness.authDescription: Ifishi zo kwinjira no kwiyandikisha zihujwe na seriveri.
readiness.routesDescription: Amapaji y'ingenzi asaba ko ubanza kwinjira.
readiness.aiDescription: Ubutumwa bwoherezwa kuri seriveri kugira ngo butunganywe neza.

company.title: Banza wandikishe ikigo cyawe mbere yo gukoresha imishahara.
company.description: SmartPayRW ikoresha izina ry'ikigo, TIN n'ubwoko bw'ubucuruzi kugira ngo imishahara, abakozi n'ibisubizo by'umufasha bishingire ku makuru nyayo.
company.name: Izina ry'ikigo
company.validation: Izina ry'ikigo, TIN n'ubwoko bw'ubucuruzi birakenewe.
company.profileDescription: Aya ni yo makuru SmartPayRW ikoresha mu mishahara no mu mufasha.
company.emptyMessage: Banza wandikishe ikigo cyawe kugira ngo SmartPayRW ikoreshe amakuru nyayo.

employees.title: Abakozi bawe
employees.description: Ongeramo abakozi, imishahara yabo n'amakuru akenewe mu gutegura imishahara.
employees.name: Izina

pension.title: Pansiyo y'abakozi
pension.description: Kurikirana imisanzu ya pansiyo y'umukozi n'iy'umukoresha mbere yo gutanga imenyekanisha.
pension.totalCaption: Amafaranga yose agomba guteganywa kuri pansiyo.

reports.title: Raporo z'imishahara
reports.description: Tegura raporo zoroheye gusoma ku mishahara, imisoro, pansiyo n'ubwishyu.
reports.payrollText: Reba amafaranga yishyuwe, abakozi bahembwe n'igihe cy'umushahara.
reports.complianceText: Reba PAYE, RSSB n'ibyo ugomba kwishyura mbere ya tariki ya 15.
reports.paymentText: Kurikirana ubwishyu bwakozwe na mobile money cyangwa indi nzira.

tax.title: Reba PAYE, RSSB, pansiyo n'uko wishyura ukoresheje TIN.
tax.description: SmartPayRW iguha imisoro mu makarita yoroshye, igihe ntarengwa n'ibisobanuro by'umufasha.
tax.loadError: Ntibyakunze kubona amakuru y'imisoro kuri iyi TIN.
tax.companySectionText: Banza wemeze ikigo mbere yo kureba inshingano z'imishahara n'imisoro.

deadlines.title: Ibyo gukora mbere y'igihe ntarengwa
deadlines.payeText: Reba neza imishahara kandi wishyure PAYE mbere ya tariki ya 15 y'ukwezi gukurikira.
deadlines.rssbText: Tegura pansiyo ya RSSB n'indi misanzu mbere y'igihe kimwe cya buri kwezi.

innovation.fastText: Imibare y'ingenzi igaragara mu makarita ako kanya.
innovation.simpleText: Uva kuri TIN ukagera ku buryo bwo kwishyura utanyuze mu mafishi menshi.
innovation.aiText: Umufasha asobanura PAYE, RSSB n'intambwe zikurikira mu magambo yoroshye.

paymentGuide.title: Ishyura ukoresheje telefoni cyangwa banki
paymentGuide.description: Ushobora kwishyura ukoresheje telefoni cyangwa banki
paymentGuide.mtnStepTwo: Shyiramo kode y'umusoro cyangwa kode yo kwishyura wahawe na SmartPayRW.
paymentGuide.mtnStepThree: Emeza amafaranga, ubike ubutumwa bwa SMS.
paymentGuide.bankText: Koresha banki yawe, ushyiremo TIN y'ikigo, igihe cy'umusoro na kode yo kwishyura.
paymentGuide.etaxText: E-tax ni yo ikoreshwa mu gutanga imenyekanisha. SmartPayRW igutegurira urutonde rworoshye mbere yo gutanga.

business.title: Andika ibyacurujwe buri munsi utujuje amafishi menshi.
business.description: Ongeramo transaction, urebe ibyacurujwe by'umunsi, kandi ubone raporo yoroshye y'ubucuruzi.
business.emptyMessage: Transactions uzongeraho kuri iyi tariki zizagaragara hano.
business.reportText: Iyi ni EBM-lite igufasha gukurikirana ubucuruzi mbere ya raporo nyayo.

admin.title: Kurikirana abakoresha, ibigo, imishahara n'uko imisoro yiteguye.
admin.description: Reba imikorere ya SmartPayRW mu buryo busukuye kandi bworoshye.
admin.notice: Amakuru ya admin nyayo ntaboneka, SmartPayRW irerekana amakuru ari muri uyu mwanya.

cards.taxesCaption: PAYE n'imisoro biri mu nyandiko z'imishahara

admin.workflowText: SmartPayRW igabanya akazi: reba, sobanukirwa, ukore icyemezo.

workflow.payrollText: Emeza imishahara n'imisanzu mbere yo kwishyura.
workflow.taxText: Huza TIN, imishahara n'ibisobanuro bya AI.

payments.title: Saba kwishyura
payments.description: Tangirira ku igerageza, urebe ko inzira ikora, nyuma ukoreshe serivisi nyazo igihe mwiteguye.
payments.validation: Shyiramo amafaranga na nomero ya telefoni ikora.
payments.simulationMessage: Igerageza ryakozwe. Banza ukoreshe iyi nzira mbere yo gufungura kwishyura nyako.
payments.summaryCopy: Umukiriya abona ubutumwa bwo kwishyura kuri serivisi wahisemo.

chat.initialMessage: Muraho, ndi umufasha wa SmartPayRW. Mbaza ku gukora imishahara, amakuru y'abakozi, imisoro, cyangwa kubahiriza amategeko.
chat.title: Baza umufasha
chat.description: Baza ku mishahara, abakozi, imisoro, cyangwa uko wakurikiza amategeko.
chat.placeholder: Baza ku kubara imishahara, abakozi, PAYE, cyangwa kubahiriza amategeko...

workflow.label: Ibikorwa umufasha agufashamo
workflow.taxText: Reba PAYE, RSSB, pansiyo n'igihe ntarengwa.
workflow.taxPrompt: Reba imisoro yawe ukoresheje amakuru nyayo y'ikigo cyanjye n'abakozi.
workflow.employeesText: Tegura amakuru y'abakozi akenewe muri payroll.
workflow.employeesPrompt: Mfasha kongeramo abakozi n'imishahara yabo neza.
workflow.payrollText: Hindura imishahara ibe PAYE, RSSB n'intambwe zo kwishyura.
workflow.payrollPrompt: Kora payroll y'ikigo cyanjye kandi werekane amakarita y'imisoro.

chat.backendError: Ntibyakunze kugera ku mufasha wa SmartPayRW.
chat.fallback: Ntibyakunze kugera ku mufasha wa SmartPayRW. Ongera ugerageze mu kanya.
chat.emptyResponse: Umufasha yasubije, ariko nta butumwa bugarutse.

local.backendNotice: Umufasha ntaboneka, SmartPayRW ikweretse igisubizo cy'igerageza.
local.obligationsAnswer: Inshingano z'umukoresha mu Rwanda akenshi zirimo kwiyandikisha kuri PAYE, gukata PAYE y'abakozi, gukata pansiyo n'umusanzu w'ikiruhuko cyo kubyara, gukusanya CBHI ku mushahara usigaye, kwishyura imisanzu y'umukoresha ya pansiyo, ikiruhuko cyo kubyara n'impanuka z'akazi, kwita ku bwishingizi bwa RSSB aho bukurikizwa, gutanga imenyekanisha rihuriweho rya PAYE/RSSB, no kubika inyandiko z'imishahara.
local.runPayrollAnswer: Kugira ngo ukoreshe imishahara neza: banza wemeze amakuru y'abakozi n'inyungu zisoreshwa, bara umushahara mbumbe usoreshwa, bara PAYE ukoresheje ibyiciro byo mu Rwanda, kata pansiyo, umusanzu w'ikiruhuko cyo kubyara na CBHI by'umukozi, ongeraho inshingano za RSSB z'umukoresha, huza imibare, tanga PAYE/RSSB ku gihe, wishyure unyuze mu nzira zemewe, kandi ubike impapuro z'umushahara n'inyemezabwishyu.
local.tinMissing: Banza wandike kandi usesengure TIN y'ikigo, hanyuma nshobore gusobanura PAYE, RSSB, CBHI n'ibyago by'imishahara bishoboka kuri icyo kigo.

tin.title: Isesengura rya TIN y'ikigo
tin.description: Sesengura TIN y'ikigo kugira ngo ubone inshingano z'imishahara, ibyago bishoboka n'amakuru ava kuri seriveri ihujwe.

obligations.paye: Kata PAYE ku mushahara w'abakozi, uyimenyeshe kandi uyishyure muri RRA bitarenze umunsi wa 15 nyuma y'igihe cy'umusoro.
obligations.pensionEmployee: Kata umusanzu wa pansiyo w'umukozi ungana na 6% by'umushahara mbumbe.
obligations.pensionEmployer: Ishyura umusanzu wa pansiyo w'umukoresha ungana na 6% by'umushahara mbumbe.
obligations.maternity: Koresha umusanzu w'ikiruhuko cyo kubyara ungana na 0.3% ku mukozi na 0.3% ku mukoresha.
obligations.occupationalHazard: Ishyura umusanzu w'impanuka z'akazi w'umukoresha ungana na 2% by'umushahara mbumbe.
obligations.cbhi: Kata CBHI ingana na 0.5% by'umushahara usigaye w'umukozi kandi uyohereze biciye ku mukoresha.
obligations.medicalScheme: Aho ubwishingizi bwa RSSB bukurikizwa, teganya umusanzu wa 7.5% w'umukozi na 7.5% w'umukoresha ku mushahara fatizo.
obligations.unifiedDeclaration: Koresha imenyekanisha rihuriweho rya PAYE/RSSB aho riboneka kandi ubike ibimenyetso by'imishahara.

liabilities.lateSurcharge: Igereranya ry'inyongera ku kwishyura utinze amezi {{months}}: {{amount}}.

tin.askPrompt: Sesengura TIN {{tin}} kandi usobanure inshingano z'imishahara, ibyago, n'intambwe zikurikira zo kubahiriza amategeko.
tin.invalidSummary: TIN {{tin}} ntiyashoboye kwemezwa. Ongera urebe nomero ugerageze.
